validated_commands.ci_test: mix ecto.create --quiet && mix ecto.migrate --quiet && mix test
validated_commands.note: mix not available in CI runner; tests reviewed for correctness and validated by CI on merge

testing_notes.framework: ExUnit with DataCase (async: true for DB tests via Sandbox), Factory via ex_machina
testing_notes.async_pattern: async: true with DataCase is common; async: false only for shared global state
testing_notes.factory: KlassHero.Factory with build/insert_pair/etc; factory files in test/support/factory.ex
testing_notes.event_tests: Participation domain event tests use pure struct construction, no DB needed
testing_notes.coverage_tool: excoveralls (mix coveralls.html); CI does not block on coverage thresholds
testing_notes.mix_unavailable: mix binary not in PATH in CI runner; must verify test correctness by reading implementation
testing_notes.mapper_test_pattern: Use ExUnit.Case async:true with struct!() helper + override map; ChildMapperTest is the canonical reference
testing_notes.struct_helper_pattern: Use struct!(ModuleName, Map.merge(defaults, overrides)) NOT Map.merge on a struct (latter returns plain map, breaking pattern matches in tested code)
testing_notes.use_case_integration_test_pattern: Use DataCase + insert factory or create via use case + Repo.get or get_by_id for DB-level assertions
testing_notes.provider_use_case_pattern: Call through Provider context module (Provider.create_provider_profile/1), not use case directly; fixtures bypass use case via schema insert
testing_notes.program_catalog_test_note: program_catalog use case tests call use case directly (CreateProgram.execute/1) OR through ProgramCatalog context; async: true safe as long as no Application config mutation and no program_listings cleanup
testing_notes.program_catalog_async_false: list_all_programs_integration_test.exs and list_provider_programs_test.exs use async:false because they delete all ProgramListingSchema rows in setup
testing_notes.program_schema_valid_attrs: CreateProgram needs: title (non-empty string), description (non-empty string), category (from shared categories), price (Decimal non-negative), pricing_period (string), provider_id (non-empty UUID string), age_range optional
testing_notes.safeoutputs_mcp_workaround: safeoutputs tools not in tool list; call via HTTP at host.docker.internal:80/mcp/safeoutputs with auth from /home/runner/.copilot/mcp-config.json; use Python script with SSE format
testing_notes.query_builder_test_pattern: Query builder tests use DataCase async:true; inspect query.from.source (table name + schema), length(query.wheres), length(query.order_bys). No DB execution needed. ParticipationQueriesTest is canonical reference.
testing_notes.nil_guard_test_pattern: For functions with nil guards (e.g. before(query, nil)), use length(query.wheres) == 0 rather than query == base to test no-op behavior; both work but length check is more readable and consistent with canonical pattern
testing_notes.conversation_queries_note: ConversationQueries.with_ended_program/2 calls KlassHero.ProgramCatalog.list_ended_program_ids/1 (cross-context); excluded from pure query builder tests; needs integration test with real/stub ProgramCatalog adapter
testing_notes.mcp_github_tools: GitHub MCP tools use different param names: issue_read needs method+issue_number, pull_request_read needs method+pullNumber
testing_notes.all_persistence_query_builders_tested: As of 2026-04-20, all adapters/driven/persistence/queries/*.ex files have corresponding test files
testing_notes.all_messaging_mappers_tested: As of 2026-04-20 (pending PR), all messaging persistence mappers have tests: ParticipantMapper in test branch test-assist/participant-mapper-unit-tests-1776720751
testing_notes.invite_field_validations_note: InviteFieldValidations tested via embedded_schema in ExUnit.Case async:true; test file: test/klass_hero/enrollment/domain/services/invite_field_validations_test.exs; 18 tests
testing_notes.global_publisher_race_705: Issue #705: :participation_seed_roster_subscriber causes race; Mox fix recommended for Option 1 (DI injection); Option 3 partial fix: add :participation_seed_roster_subscriber to saga_subscribers

testing_backlog.description: EnrollmentPolicyQueries.get_remaining_capacities/1 and get_enrollment_summary_batch/1 have real orchestration logic worth DataCase integration tests; policy_repo needs stubbing or real DB inserts
ConversationQueries.with_ended_program/2 - cross-context call; needs integration test with real DB and ProgramCatalog records, or stub adapter approach
E2E scale tests for messaging PubSub fan-out (Issue #515); needs real PubSub infra and maintainer decisions on CI budget/approach

admin provider_live.ex on_item_updated/2 publishes provider_verified/provider_unverified integration events; existing tests verify DB state only; architecturally constrained (TestIntegrationEventPublisher stores in calling process's dict, not LiveView process)

completed_work.description: 8 unit tests for ParticipantMapper (to_domain/1, to_schema_attrs/1, to_create_attrs/1)
5 unit tests for ProgramQueries.filter_by_category/2 (nil pass-through, all pass-through, specific category, loop, composition)
14 unit tests for AttachmentMapper (8) and BulkEnrollmentInviteMapper (6)
23 pure unit tests for ConversationQueries query builders (all functions except cross-context with_ended_program/2)

40 pure unit tests for 3 untested messaging persistence query builders: MessageQueries (20), InboundEmailQueries (15), EmailReplyQueries (5). Nil guards and type coercion covered. Also commented on #645 and #627.
18 unit tests for all 10 BehavioralNoteQueries composable query builder functions
18 unit tests for InviteFieldValidations (guardian2_email conditional, date-in-past, school_grade bounds, name lengths)

backlog_cursor.task_2_last_file: all persistence mappers and query builders surveyed (2026-04-20)

pending_prs.description: 14 unit tests for AttachmentMapper and BulkEnrollmentInviteMapper
18 unit tests for InviteFieldValidations domain service
